goal: Fix all identified security issues across backend and frontend, add tests, verify no regressions
summary: All security fixes applied across backend and frontend. 23 tests pass (0 failures), including new tests for fs.js, auth helpers, and files.js. Server starts without errors. Test output saved to `.kimchi/docs/test-output-fixes.txt`.
stepSummaries:
1. Fix backend Critical and High issues: symlink path traversal in fs.js, timing attacks and cookie Secure flag in index.js [verified]
  2. Fix backend Medium and Low issues: error path leaks in files.js and projects.js, rate limiting and parseCookies in index.js, extension whitelist in files.js [verified]
  3. Fix frontend Critical and High issues: XSS in map.html tooltips, XSS in sidebar.js file list [verified]
  4. Fix frontend Medium and Low issues: toast innerHTML, inline event handlers migration [verified]
  5. Add backend tests for modified modules and run full test suite [verified]
  6. Verify server starts without errors and document final results [verified]
